contentList.content: Execute
Attempt to finish off a foe below [2] hit points, dealing an extra [1] damage.
Whirlwind
Unleashes a whirlwind of steel, striking all nearby enemies.
Charge
Charge to an enemy, damaging and possibly <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="RESTRAINED">Restraining</LSTag> them for [1] turn(s).
Double Time
After using <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Rush_Charge">Charge</LSTag>, you can use it once more with no class resource cost / cooldown.
You can use <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Rush_Charge">Charge</LSTag> once more with no class resource cost or cooldown. Expires on <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Sudden Death

When you kill an enemy using a Fury Attack or Arms Strike, your next <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Execute_Warrior">Execute</LSTag> is usable on any target regardless of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> and has no class resource cost / cooldown.
This can trigger once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.

Your next <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_Execute_Warrior">Execute</LSTag> is usable on any target regardless of <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> and has no class resource cost or cooldown. Expires on <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Thunder Clap
Blasts all nearby enemies, possibly knocking them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag>, or else making them <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="OFF_BALANACED">Off Balanced</LSTag>.
Storm Bolt
Hurl lightning at an enemy, possibly <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="STUNNED">Stunning</LSTag> them for 1 turn.
Anger Management

Whenever you land a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> on a target, refund any spend <LSTag Type="ActionResource" Tooltip="Rage">Rage Charges</LSTag> if it was a Fury Attack, or ignore its cooldown if it was an Arms Strike.
Does not apply when multiple targets are attacked at once.
